headline: Keracolor Debuts Brand Evolution, Celebrating a Decade of Innovation with New Digital Footprint and National Retail Expansion
summary: Keracolor, a pioneer in salon-quality, temporary hair color, announces a complete brand refresh to mark its tenth anniversary. After a decade of defining the at-home hair color category, the brand is rolling out a sophisticated refresh that includes updated packaging, a revamped social ecosystem with an expanded collection at Target featuring exclusive new product offerings. The milestone signals Keracolor's transition from its 2016 salon-exclusive roots to a national lifestyle brand that has ac

headline: What To Expect From Ulta’s (ULTA) Q4 Earnings
summary: Beauty, cosmetics, and personal care retailer Ulta Beauty (NASDAQ:ULTA) will be announcing earnings results this Thursday after the bell. Here’s what to expect.
